events.title: V1.13
events.desc:
He’s here! 🤗
We’ve teamed up with Youtooz for our very first merch drop - introducing the plush version of our own Nyrian Gladiator, Zarus! 🦎
Pre-orders go live on their website starting April 7, and we’ll let you know the moment they’re available 🗓️
We’ll also be giving away some plushies to a few lucky winners, so stay tuned for more details!
 @Official News

events.title: ADELE
events.desc:
Thorns are spreading across the battlefield… 🌹 
That can only mean one thing...
Adele is joining the fight in V1.13: Throne of Thorns, coming April 7th!
https://youtu.be/_mxjJioNuhI
 @Official News
Adele Queen of Thorns | Reveal Trailer | Predecessor
Adele joins the fight in update 1.13: Throne of Thorns on April 7th!
Predecessor redefines the modern MOBA genre, blending stunning realistic environments with explosive third-person action. 
PLAY NOW!
https://playp.red/playnow

events.title: CONNECTIVITY ISSUES
events.desc:
The Epic Online Services is currently experiencing connectivity issues, which may be causing login issues for some players in Predecessor.
The dev team is aware and is working closely with our partners to resolve this as soon as possible.
Our apologies for the inconvenience, and thank you for your patience.

events.title: DOWNTIME
events.desc:
⚠️ Upcoming Downtime
Predecessor game servers will enter maintenance mode as we push a new game update. During this time you will be unable to play.

events.title: DAYBREAK V4
events.desc:
🌇 Size - adjusted 
🗺️ Layout - improved
🏃 Lower Mobility Heroes - empowered
Daybreak V4 is coming in V1.13: Throne of Thorns on April 7th - bringing some of the most exciting changes yet! 🔥

events.title: DEV STREAM
events.desc:
# 🎥 v1.13 Dev Stream - 1st April 
v1.13 Throne of Thorns is just around the corner! We'll be live on Twitch next week for a first look at the new update 🌹
Mark it in your calendar and we'll see you in chat!
🗓️01 April | ⏰ 6PM UTC / 2PM ET
